name: No witnesses to my warehouse injury in Saint George—can I still claim?
description: Yes, medical and report evidence enough.[1]

mainEntity.name: No witnesses to my warehouse injury in Saint George—can I still claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, medical and report evidence enough.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, your report, medical records, and circumstances suffice.** Witnesses help but not required.[1] Key factors: Consistent doctor story, incident details key. Document site, get photos. Many claims succeed without witnesses.
